_comment: EXAMPLE manifest only — synthetic, NOT real data. The real evals/labels.json (gitignored) follows this exact shape: keyed by the SHA-256 content hash of each årsredovisning PDF, with the expert-labelled correct value per field. expectedOsaker marks fixtures the system SHOULD flag as uncertain (out-of-band / scanned). The soft-signal labels (D-02, brf-extract/v2) record the expected stambyte status and whether a larger renovation / övrig anmärkning should be found and cited; expectedStambyte is one of planerat | nyligen_genomfort | ej_nämnt. See AI-SPEC §4b/§5.
